creator: kwm@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 164384
[patch] move bsd.gnome.mk and bsd.mate.mk to USES

Move bsd.gnome.mk and bsd.mate.mk to USES. This patch has been in use for a while now in the GNOME development repo.

bsd.port.mk has some migration code so all ports can be migrated to the new USES after this patch is committed. CHANGES and bsd.sanity.mk updates are included.

This patch is from: https://reviews.freebsd.org/D3653 .
